color.modes.default.surface.base.usage: Use as the background for the primary content area, cards, modals, and any surface that sits at the base elevation level.
color.modes.default.surface.base.consumerNotes: Foundational surface token. Part of the elevation scale. All raised surfaces sit above this.

color.modes.default.surface.raised.usage: Use for surfaces that appear elevated above the page background. Typical use: cards, panels, popovers within a primary surface.
color.modes.default.surface.raised.consumerNotes: New in Cedar v3. Currently under review; expect minor adjustments through Q2 2026.
